testcase.name: test_keys_values_has_del
testcase.failure: tests/test_dicts.py:45: in test_keys_values_has_del assert run(src) == expected ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:304: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:53: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:58: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:62: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:259: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:269: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get raise Exception(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E Exception: Undefined variable 'keys'

testcase.name: test_for_over_list_one_var
testcase.failure:
tests/test_dicts.py:53: in test_for_over_list_one_var assert run(src) == "10
20
30
" E AssertionError: assert '' == '10
20
30
' E E - 10 E - 20 E - 30

testcase.name: test_for_over_list_enumerate
testcase.failure:
tests/test_dicts.py:61: in test_for_over_list_enumerate assert run(src) == "0 10
1 20
2 30
" E AssertionError: assert '' == '0 10
1 20
2 30
' E E - 0 10 E - 1 20 E - 2 30

testcase.name: test_for_over_dict
testcase.failure:
tests/test_dicts.py:69: in test_for_over_dict assert run(src) == "a 1
b 2
" E AssertionError: assert '' == 'a 1
b 2
' E E - a 1 E - b 2

testcase.name: test_for_break_continue
testcase.failure:
tests/test_dicts.py:81: in test_for_break_continue assert run(src) == "1
3
" E AssertionError: assert '' == '1
3
' E E - 1 E - 3

testcase.name: test_len_of_list
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:32: in test_len_of_list assert run("print(len([1, 2, 3, 4]));") == "4\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:304: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:53: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:58: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:62: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:259: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:269: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get raise Exception(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E Exception: Undefined variable 'len'

testcase.name: test_push_appends_and_mutates
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:43: in test_push_appends_and_mutates assert run(src) == "[1, 2, 3]\n3\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:304: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:53: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:58: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:62: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:269: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get raise Exception(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E Exception: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_pop_returns_and_shrinks
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:53: in test_pop_returns_and_shrinks assert run(src) == "30\n[10, 20]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:304: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:53: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:58: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:64: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:269: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get raise Exception(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E Exception: Undefined variable 'pop'

testcase.name: test_list_passed_to_fn_mutates_caller_view
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:78: in test_list_passed_to_fn_mutates_caller_view assert run(src) == "[1, 1]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:304: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:53: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:58: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:62: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:286: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:62: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:133: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:269: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:26: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get raise Exception(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E Exception: Undefined variable 'push'
